description: You are a bone morphologist studying cranial bone microarchitecture using CT imaging. The CT Cranium DICOM series is already loaded in InVesalius 3. Isolate the cancellous bone compartment by creating a compact bone mask (662–1988 HU) and a full bone mask (226–3071 HU), then performing a boolean subtraction (full bone minus compact bone) to produce a mask representing the cancellous bone interior. Generate a 3D surface from the cancellous bone mask and export it as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/cancellous_study/cancellous_bone.stl. Save the complete project, including the compact, full, and cancellous bone masks, to /home/ga/Documents/cancellous_study/bone_analysis.inv3. Login credentials: username=ga, password=password123
